data.content: Approved implementation review. Verified commit 26dfbd5b3d18 removes the launcher's foolery prompt command, drops prompt-template and AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md mutation helpers from scripts/install.sh and scripts/setup.sh, and no longer runs prompt-guidance updates during setup. Sanity checks passed: bash -n scripts/install.sh scripts/setup.sh, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2018 passed), and bun run build. Residual risk: there is no direct automated test focused on these shell-script prompt-removal paths.
